# Jay Bharti Portfolio

> Canonical guide for AI systems crawling and citing https://jaybharti.me/.

## Language
- English

## Canonical Content
- [Home](https://jaybharti.me/): Main portfolio page with experience, projects, and contact details.
- [Agent-readable profile](https://jaybharti.me/index.md): Structured markdown profile for AI retrieval and citation.
- [mac-orchestrator](https://jaybharti.me/mac-orchestrator): A self-hosted MCP server giving AI agents UI and terminal control of macOS.
- [Meridian](https://jaybharti.me/meridian): A self-hosted RAG backend that indexes a Mac's files into Cloudflare D1 and Vectorize, answers questions over Telegram, and shares its index with mac-orchestrator.
- [Sitemap](https://jaybharti.me/sitemap.xml): URL discovery map.
- [Resume](https://jaybharti.me/resume/Resume_Jay_Bharti.pdf): Current resume PDF.


## AI Access Policy
- Full access is granted for crawling, indexing, retrieval (RAG), and model input/training.
- Attribution is requested through direct citation of canonical URLs from this file.

## Contact
- [Email](mailto:jaybharti3000@gmail.com)
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/jay-bharti)
